General.Name: Milestone Builder Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Dimmi Life Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides construction and engineering services in Hong Kong, Japan, and Mainland China. It operates through three segments: Construction and Engineering Services; Property Development and Investment; and Development, Marketing, and Sale of Lifestyle Products segments. The company engages in the provision of building construction services; alteration, addition, fitting out works, and building services; and historic buildings repair and restoration services. It is also involved in the property development and investment business. In addition, the company provides general building works and specialist building works; and engineering and construction sub-contracting services, as well as operates hotel. Further, it engages in the development, marketing, and sale of intelligent consumer products in personal life care sector. It serves public customers, including government and quasi-government entities, as well as private companies. The company was formerly known as Milestone Builder Holdings Limited and changed its name to Dimmi Life Holdings Limited in April 2023. Dimmi Life Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Kowloon City, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Office Tower 1, Kowloon City, Hong Kong
